name: SCAR-20 | 仓库突击
descriptionEn: The SCAR-20 is a semi-automatic sniper rifle that trades a high rate of fire and powerful long-distance damage for sluggish movement speed and big price tag. The logo of a research facility has been hand painted in white over a blue base. Also available in red
descriptionZh: SCAR-20 是一把以迟缓的移动速度和高昂的价格为代价，换取高射速及强大的远距离杀伤力的半自动狙击步枪。 这把武器使用了自定义涂装。外表像极了喷绘着研究机构白色图标的集装箱。 红色集装箱也可用
